Oracle Spring Boot Starters - Database Starters
  1. com.oracle.spring.spatial

Uses of Package
com.oracle.spring.spatial

Packages that use com.oracle.spring.spatial
Package
Description
com.oracle.spring.spatial
 
  • Classes in com.oracle.spring.spatial used by com.oracle.spring.spatial
    Class
    Description
    OracleSpatialProperties
    Configuration properties for Oracle Spatial helper beans.
    SpatialExpression
    Represents a spatial SQL expression that can be used in a select list, insert/update value expression, or order clause while still carrying any required JDBC bind values.
    SpatialGeometry
    Represents a GeoJSON value and SRID that can be bound into Oracle Spatial SQL generated by OracleSpatialJdbcOperations.
    SpatialJdbcBindable
    Contract for spatial query parts that can apply their bind parameters to a JdbcClient.StatementSpec.
    SpatialPredicate
    Represents a spatial predicate suitable for use in a SQL WHERE clause while carrying the bind values needed by Spring JDBC.
    SpatialRelationMask
    Supported Oracle Spatial relationship masks for SDO_RELATE.
